meaning: 争取安哥拉彻底独立全国同盟
examples: Russia demanded that UNITA send a delegation to the peace talks.
UNITA was legalized as a political party under the 1991 peace accords.
Dos Santos has demanded that UNITA sign a cease-fire and demobilize its troops.
Unita has funded its armed campaign by selling diamonds, while the government has relied on oil revenues.
"But the Unita secretary general told me the negotiations were now being conducted in earnest, " he said.
